title: Command Center Automations list and run history under ten-surface shell Engineering Spec
summary: This Feature SHALL re-home Command Center automations list, create wizard, and run history into the ten-surface shell at route /automations per ratified ux-spec §4.11. The Feature SHALL consume shipped registry CRUD and scheduler run-history APIs from command-center-automation-registry-and-management-ui and…
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
